code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut buf = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(buf)
      match string.parse_int(buf)
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
        count = count + 1
      when None
        ()
      end
      buf = ""
    end
  else
    buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(buf)
  match string.parse_int(buf)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
    count = count + 1
  when None
    ()
  end
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
